claims.claim: Pressure/porosity divergence threshold behavior should be pinned so high pressure plus low porosity becomes visible without silently mutating controller authority.
`resonance_control_from_density_with_mode_packing` should visibly switch to `ActiveDamping` when pressure risk crosses the existing high-pressure threshold.
Changing mode-packing so it directly modulates PI target bias or wander scale would alter live regulator/control behavior and needs explicit Mike/operator approval.
